findings.evidence: name matches read heuristic; no mcp:read-only annotation
findings.note: Command name matches read heuristic but body mutates external state: calls runAudit() against the API for each row and optionally re-sends messages via --retry-failed. Annotation 'mcp:read-only': 'false' is explicitly set (line 51). The heuristic name match is a false positive — reconcile here means 'reconcile delivery state' which involves API calls and conditional writes, not a pure local read.
